history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image is a stylized anime-like close-up featuring a smiling girl with red eyes and bold outlined text over the scene.

The main subject is a young-looking anime-style person with brown hair in a side-swept style and red eyes, shown from the upper body upward. The person has a cheerful expression with a visible blush tone and an open mouth smile, and their right arm is raised forward in the foreground with a clenched fist. They wear a light-colored top with dark straps, including a blue-gray strap across the chest and a visible dark ribbon or strap element near the shoulder. Their head and upper torso fill most of the frame.

The setting appears to be a flat, illustrated background with warm yellow and orange tones, suggesting an indoor or graphic backdrop rather than a realistic environment. Lighting is bright and warm, with the image framed as a poster-like composition.

The composition places large, bold, blocky text with white fill and black outline at the top and bottom. The top text reads “DIEM LU” and the bottom text reads “PEDO”.

Visible Text:
DIEM LU
PEDO

Practical Summary:
A close-up anime-style character with red eyes smiles with one fist raised toward the viewer. Large outlined text overlays the image, reading “DIEM LU” at the top and “PEDO” at the bottom.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
